title: Good Fellowship
content:
A glass is good, a lass is good,
        And a pipe to smoke in cold weather,
     The world is good and the people are good,
        And we're all good fellows together.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Good Fellowship"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
